# Clawmachine historical-UI reference — Master Index

Internal non-commercial fair-use research reference. Do not redistribute.  
Total downloaded: 71 MB across 20 targets.

## Ranked by Clawmachine fit

### S — core donor

- **mac-os-9/** — Mac OS 9 / System 7 / Copland — Finder, Apple Menu, Control Strip, Extensions
  - Direct ancestor aesthetic. Platinum + Chicago + pinstripes = baseline register. Control Strip + Extensions Manager = density vocabulary.
- **bloomberg-terminal/** — Bloomberg Terminal — function density, Launchpad, orange-on-black
  - The top reference for hostile-density UI as operator asset. Orange-on-black + monospace + single-letter function codes are the cultural keystones.
- **pip-boy/** — Fallout Pip-Boy — amber/green phosphor terminal
  - Direct aesthetic cousin. Amber + scanline + monospace + hierarchical menus. A strong but potentially cliche reference — use ingredients, not full recipe.
- **deus-ex/** — Deus Ex: Human Revolution / Mankind Divided — augmented HUD, gold-on-black
  - Gold-black-hexagon corporate-transhuman. Closest to 'operator HUD as product' aesthetic in this set. Very strong candidate for alert / status overlay vocabulary.
- **dead-space/** — Dead Space — diegetic UI (RIG spine, hologram menus)
  - The gold standard for 'HUD is the character's world'. Not aesthetically retro, but philosophically aligned: no chrome sitting on top, UI lives in-world. Blue/white holograms, thin weights.
- **cli-tools/** — CLI / TUI — htop, btop, lazygit, vim status lines
  - Live reference. This is what the operator already uses. btop colour gradients + lazygit three-pane + Vim status lines = daily working vocabulary.
- **mac-icon-archives/** — Classic Mac icon archives — bitmap 32x32 ICN# era
  - Bitmap icon pedigree. Already have retro-kare-classic-mac-icons plugin — this adds source-material proof and additional breadth.
- **susan-kare/** — Susan Kare — original bitmap sketches + early Mac icon design
  - Root of aesthetic. Hand-drawn 32x32 gridded paper sketches. Operator's Chicago font + icon set literally descend from here.

### A — strong

- **nextstep/** — NeXTSTEP / OPENSTEP 4.2 — dock, Workspace Manager, file viewer
  - Dark chrome, 3D bevels, monospaced UI type. Anti-platinum. The 'pro workstation' voice for panels and inspectors.
- **beos-haiku/** — BeOS / Haiku — Tracker, Deskbar, replicants
  - Yellow-tab windows + title-bar tabs = window-identity vocabulary. Deskbar 'always on top' list-style task UI.
- **pro-tools-cubase-reaper/** — Pro Tools / Cubase / Logic Pro — mixer channel strips, meters, faders
  - Grey-rack + vertical faders + strip-of-controls = tool language for 'many parallel processes visualized'.
- **reaper-daw/** — Reaper DAW — dense custom-theme UI
  - Reaper's TCP + dense toolbar shows how far pro-tool density can push without becoming illegible. Good reference for operator-panel density.
- **winamp-skins/** — Winamp classic skins — skinnable player aesthetic
  - Paradigm reference for theme engine: same functional shell, radically different skins. 'Really whips the llama's ass' — operator personality, not flat corporate.
- **cyberpunk-2077-hud/** — Cyberpunk 2077 HUD — minimap, corpo popups, inventory grid
  - Use-the-HUD-not-the-chrome discipline. Cyan/yellow/red typographic alerts + glitchy corpo overlays. We already have retro-cyberpunk-2077-theme plugin — this is the live-game reference.
- **eve-online/** — EVE Online — overview window, dense tabular MMO UI
  - The permission to have a window with 200 rows + 20 columns. Column header vocabulary (range/angular/type/transversal) is pure operator bait.
- **ksp-factorio/** — Kerbal Space Program + Factorio — diegetic production / mission dashboards
  - Factorio's statistics + science dashboards + circuit-network UIs are pure operator-dashboard reference. KSP mission control lighting is the backdrop vocabulary.
- **rpg-inventory/** — Diablo 2 / Path of Exile / Dragon Age — RPG inventory grids
  - Tetris-grid inventory vocabulary. Item rarity colour codes = tag/status reference. Strongest fit: category & price-tier chips in the catalog.

### B — supporting

- **win2k-admin/** — Windows 2000 / 98 professional admin tools — MMC, Event Viewer, Registry, Perfmon
  - Not a direct aesthetic donor but the tree+panel density model is load-bearing for anything 'operator console'.
- **classic-im/** — Trillian / mIRC / Adium — classic IM + IRC chat aesthetic
  - Not core Clawmachine aesthetic, but: buddy-list dense vertical lists, colored nicks, condensed fonts. Useful for any 'chat/console/activity' sidecar.

### C — counter-example

- **mass-effect/** — Mass Effect: Andromeda — soft-tech SciFi UI
  - Low-fit: too polished, too soft, too much teal glow. Useful only as counter-example of 'clean SciFi UI we are NOT aiming for'.
